civilopediaText.text: Kentern II, son of the late Kentern, inherited the rulership of the nation in a time of crisis. Forced out of their former lands into the harsh, cold tundras due to the incompetence of his father, whom had made enemies of just about every nation around them. Now, the new leader sits and stews, rebuilding the nation, awaiting his time to strike. Loyal to friends, and absolutely detests his enemies.
